intro: Design, organize, and perfect the flow of your supermarket.
description:
Design your store layout, keep shelves stocked, set competitive prices, and deliver fast, reliable service to keep customers coming back. Step behind the counter, manage daily operations, and watch your store evolve as you expand, upgrade, and optimize every detail.
Start small, think big, and build your own retail success story. 

In Supermarket Simulator 2026, you take control of a humble local shop and turn it into a bustling supermarket. With only basic equipment and ambition on your side, every decision you make shapes the future of your business.

Build your ultimate supermarket with deep and detailed customization. From store layout and product placement to pricing strategies and staffing, every choice affects how your business performs and stands out.

Key Features:
● Immersive retail experience where you manage every aspect of your own supermarket
● Full store customization system with flexible layout design and efficient space organization
● Product ordering and inventory management with dynamic stocking and pricing control
● Interactive checkout system with scanning, payments, and real-time customer service
● Store expansion and upgrades that transform a small shop into a modern supermarket
● Staff hiring and management system to automate tasks and improve daily operations
● Progression system that rewards smart decisions, efficiency, and business growth

Build from the ground up, master the flow of business, and become the ultimate supermarket owner.
